title: Better Click Sounds
description: Changes the click sound in menus and UIs to the sound of the copper bulb toggling.
body:
# Better Click Sound
Changes the menu and UI click sound to be more subtle, quiet, and less obnoxious. The sound used is the copper bulb toggle sound, which you can listen to [here.](https://minecraft.wiki/images/Copper_bulb_toggle.ogg?a81eb)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FC1B5wdW6YU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#
Unlike other resource packs, this pack **does not** change other sounds such as the button or pressure plate sounds as a side effect, which is very good!

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-click-sound/)
